'''âz-p-h''' ('''kazapah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenoimmunize|xenoimmunize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenoimmunize|xenoimmunize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| kazapah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizapah|thizapah]] || [[word:jizapah|jizapah]] || [[word:shizapah|shizapah]] || [[word:kizapah|kizapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzapah|thuthuzapah]] || [[word:jujuzapah|jujuzapah]] || [[word:shushuzapah|shushuzapah]] || [[word:kukuzapah|kukuzapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzapah|thuzapah]] || [[word:juzapah|juzapah]] || [[word:shuzapah|shuzapah]] || [[word:kuzapah|kuzapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzapah|thuzapah]] || [[word:juzapah|juzapah]] || [[word:shuzapah|shuzapah]] || [[word:kuzapah|kuzapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezapah|thezapah]] || [[word:jezapah|jezapah]] || [[word:shezapah|shezapah]] || [[word:kezapah|kezapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozapah|thothozapah]] || [[word:jojozapah|jojozapah]] || [[word:shoshozapah|shoshozapah]] || [[word:kokozapah|kokozapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozapah|thozapah]] || [[word:jozapah|jozapah]] || [[word:shozapah|shozapah]] || [[word:kozapah|kozapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozapah|thozapah]] || [[word:jozapah|jozapah]] || [[word:shozapah|shozapah]] || [[word:kozapah|kozapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzapah|thĂŠzapah]] || [[word:jĂŠzapah|jĂŠzapah]] || [[word:shĂŠzapah|shĂŠzapah]] || [[word:kĂŠzapah|kĂŠzapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazapah|thathazapah]] || [[word:jajazapah|jajazapah]] || [[word:shashazapah|shashazapah]] || [[word:kakazapah|kakazapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazapah|thazapah]] || [[word:jazapah|jazapah]] || [[word:shazapah|shazapah]] || [[word:kazapah|kazapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazapah|thazapah]] || [[word:jazapah|jazapah]] || [[word:shazapah|shazapah]] || [[word:kazapah|kazapah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazapah|shazapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazapah|goshazapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazapah|gokishazapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazapahnĂŒ|shazapahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazapahnknĂŒ|goshazapahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapahnĂŒ|gokishazapahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazapahshĂ«|shazapahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazapahnkshĂ«|goshazapahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazapahshĂ«|gokishazapahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapahro|shazapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapahnkro|goshazapahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapahro|gokishazapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapahmu|shazapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapahnkmu|goshazapahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapahmu|gokishazapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazapahsher|shazapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazapahnksher|goshazapahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazapahsher|gokishazapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazapahng|shazapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazapahnkng|goshazapahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazapahng|gokishazapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazapahya|shazapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazapahnkya|goshazapahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazapahya|gokishazapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazapahyam|shazapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazapahnkyam|goshazapahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazapahyam|gokishazapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapahnĂŒshĂ«|shazapahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazapahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazapahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapahnĂŒro|shazapahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapahnknĂŒro|goshazapahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapahnĂŒro|gokishazapahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapahnĂŒmu|shazapahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapahnknĂŒmu|goshazapahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapahnĂŒmu|gokishazapahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapahshĂ«nĂŒ|shazapahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazapahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazapahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapahshĂ«ro|shazapahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapahnkshĂ«ro|goshazapahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapahshĂ«ro|gokishazapahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapahshĂ«mu|shazapahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapahnkshĂ«mu|goshazapahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapahshĂ«mu|gokishazapahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapahronĂŒ|shazapahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapahnkronĂŒ|goshazapahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapahronĂŒ|gokishazapahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapahroshĂ«|shazapahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapahnkroshĂ«|goshazapahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapahroshĂ«|gokishazapahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazapahromu|shazapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazapahnkromu|goshazapahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazapahromu|gokishazapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazapahmunĂŒ|shazapahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazapahnkmunĂŒ|goshazapahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazapahmunĂŒ|gokishazapahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazapahmushĂ«|shazapahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazapahnkmushĂ«|goshazapahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazapahmushĂ«|gokishazapahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazapahmuro|shazapahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazapahnkmuro|goshazapahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazapahmuro|gokishazapahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
